metadata.description: OloLand's plugin marketplace for Claude Code and Claude Cowork. Institutional buy-side underwriting depth on top of Anthropic's finance plugin lineup: deterministic financial engines, 246-category risk taxonomy, forensic QoE primitives, cross-deal learning, and the compliance hooks Anthropic's vertical plugins ship empty.

plugins.name: ololand-dd
plugins.description: Institutional due diligence for Claude — deterministic financial engines, 246-category risk taxonomy, forensic QoE, cross-document reconciliation, war-game RL strategy simulation, and a flywheel that retrains from analyst corrections. Counter-positions Anthropic's native private-equity plugin. Adds forensic-screener + war-game-strategist sub-agents and playbook-recall + calibrate-vs-history commands in v1.5.

plugins.name: ololand-compliance-hooks
plugins.description: Drop-in compliance, citation, and provenance hooks for Anthropic's Claude Cowork finance plugins. PreToolUse MNPI guard, PostToolUse citation enforcer, audit-log writeback. Populates the empty hooks/ scaffold Anthropic's finance verticals ship with.

plugins.name: ololand-forensic-qoe
plugins.description: Forensic Quality-of-Earnings primitives as a standalone plugin: Beneish M-Score, Benford's Law, EBITDA bridge, journal-entry testing, lapping detection, working-capital deep dive. The Pre-LOI Forensic Screen wedge — $7,500 / 72 hours, IC-defensible, vs Big-4 QoE at $150-500K / 4-8 weeks.
